title: Stonesaga Campaign Journal
summary: A companion app for Stonesaga — track crafting discoveries, behemoths, challenges, culture, and campaign history.
description: A table-friendly web app for the Stonesaga board game. Records crafted item recipes and dead-end codes, explores material combinations using token pip data, and supports import/merge so the whole group shares one journal. Being expanded into a full campaign journal with sections for the valley map, tribe culture, behemoths, challenge records, investigations, and a cave-wall picture gallery.
